title: Israel Struck an Iranian Steel Facility. Was It a Valid Military Target?
summary_full: During the war, Israel attacked Iran’s steel plants, saying they provided forces with revenue and the means to make weapons, but it also hurt the civilian economy.
summary_public: During the war, Israel attacked Iran’s steel plants, saying they provided forces with revenue and the means to make weapons, but it also hurt the civilian economy.

IL.label: negative
